title: EasyMiner
description: A vanilla-friendly Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 that improves mining and tree chopping with tool-restricted 3×3 mining and tree felling.
body:
EasyMiner is a vanilla-friendly Fabric mod for Minecraft that improves mining and woodcutting efficiency without changing core gameplay balance.

It adds 3×3 mining and tree felling features that only activate when the correct tool is used for each block. Holding Shift (sneak) temporarily disables all features, allowing precise block breaking when needed.

The mod is designed to feel natural, balanced, and fully compatible with standard survival gameplay.
